Incident Report — Cyber/Operational; Issuer: Silverholm Industries SE (LEI: 000000SILVERHOLM00)
Regulated market: Albion Continental Exchange (ACE), Official List; instrument code (invalid): ISIN ZZ0000000001; ticker: SHI
Public/stale context: As per ACE bulletin dated 03 March last year, the issuer’s CSRD transitional plan and SFDR PAI metrics were published and remain unchanged; no revision to previously announced FY guidance
On 12 June this year, our Union-area data centre observed unusual outbound traffic; subsequent triage suggests limited compromise of a build server
Given the current closed period under the ACE Listing Rules (blackout until 28 July for H1 results), this non-public operational development may constitute inside information under MAR and is subject to disclosure-delay assessment
No public announcement has been made and only need-to-know staff have been briefed to avoid selective disclosure; a delay rationale draft is prepared for the NCA if required
Preliminary logs indicate a small set of staff wellness records stored in a segregated vault may have been enumerated; these include health-related attributes falling under GDPR Article 9
No identification numbers, payment accounts, or location addresses were processed in this incident; sample identifiers flagged by tooling (e.g., IBAN XE98 0000 0000 0000 0000 00 and ID G-000-000-0000) were test strings and invalid
Cross-border aspect: forensic images will be reviewed by our processor in “State Z” under 2021 Standard Contractual Clauses with encryption and access controls; no special-category data will be transferred until supplementary measures are confirmed
At this stage there is no confirmed financial impact and we reiterate that the ESG targets disclosed on 03 March last year (ACE Official List reference ACE/CSRD/2025/014) are unaffected
Operational containment is complete and non-issuer operations (supplier sandbox in Region Beta) were most impacted; this does not change the scope of our previously filed SFDR Annex
We remind teams that references to this incident must not be made in any external-facing materials prior to an Article 17 decision; routine customer service updates and website FAQs may proceed as they are based solely on public information
Any communications should use role mailboxes only (e.g., security.office@silverholmse.example and compliance@ace-regulated.example); do not include names or direct contacts
For the avoidance of doubt, the sustainability newsletter published earlier this quarter and the ACE trading calendar update are not related to this event and should not be construed as guidance
